plugins.name: issue-workflow
plugins.description: Autonomous issue-to-PR workflow with 8 Claude Code stages

plugins.name: deep-review
plugins.description: 9-stage deep codebase review with parallel sub-reviewers and automated remediation

plugins.name: triage
plugins.description: Issue triage workflow: consolidates open issues and in-code TODOs into a small set of well-scoped, dependency-aware issues ready for the issue workflow

plugins.name: branchflow
plugins.description: Release-train orchestrator: cascades semver update branches (major/minor/patch) or a single develop line and cuts version-bump release PRs into main. Merge-only, PR-driven, invariant-guarded
